info.name: AI Symptom Checker API
info.description: API collection for AI-powered symptom analysis and doctor recommendations

body.raw:
{
    "symptoms": "I have a severe headache and fever for the past 2 days. The headache is throbbing and located at the front of my head. I also feel very tired.",
    "age": "28",
    "gender": "male",
    "duration": "2 days",
    "severity": "moderate"
}

{
    "symptoms": "I have chest pain that radiates to my left arm. It started suddenly about an hour ago and feels like pressure. I'm also sweating and feel nauseous.",
    "age": "55",
    "gender": "male",
    "duration": "1 hour",
    "severity": "severe"
}

{
    "symptoms": "I've been having stomach pain and diarrhea for 3 days. The pain is cramping and I feel bloated. I also feel weak and dehydrated.",

    "gender": "female",
    "duration": "3 days",
    "severity": "moderate"
}

{

}
